'''zathaha''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:ufra|ufra]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''male''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| z-th-h
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:ufra|ufra]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| male
|-
! Citation form
| zathaha
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:zæthæhæth|zæthæhæth]] || [[word:zæthæhæj|zæthæhæj]] || [[word:zæthæhæsh|zæthæhæsh]] || [[word:zæthæhæ|zæthæhæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:zathathahath|zathathahath]] || [[word:zathathahaj|zathathahaj]] || [[word:zathathahash|zathathahash]] || [[word:zathathaha|zathathaha]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:zathahath|zathahath]] || [[word:zathahaj|zathahaj]] || [[word:zathahash|zathahash]] || [[word:zathaha|zathaha]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:zathafhath|zathafhath]] || [[word:zathafhaj|zathafhaj]] || [[word:zathafhash|zathafhash]] || [[word:zathafhaf|zathafhaf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:zathahatha|zathahatha]] || [[word:zathahaja|zathahaja]] || [[word:zathahasha|zathahasha]] || [[word:zathahaka|zathahaka]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:zathahath|zathahath]] || [[word:zathahaj|zathahaj]] || [[word:zathahash|zathahash]] || [[word:zathaha|zathaha]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:zathahathal|zathahathal]] || [[word:zathahajal|zathahajal]] || [[word:zathahashal|zathahashal]] || [[word:zathahakal|zathahakal]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:zathahathatha|zathahathatha]] || [[word:zathahajaja|zathahajaja]] || [[word:zathahashasha|zathahashasha]] || [[word:zathahaka|zathahaka]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:zathahathan|zathahathan]] || [[word:zathahajan|zathahajan]] || [[word:zathahashan|zathahashan]] || [[word:zathahakan|zathahakan]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:zathahathaoro|zathahathaoro]] || [[word:zathahajaoro|zathahajaoro]] || [[word:zathahashaoro|zathahashaoro]] || [[word:zathahakaoro|zathahakaoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki male nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|d03cc2d}}
